name: Protara Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Protara Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing TARA-002, an investigational cell therapy for non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC) and lymphatic malformations (LMs), and IV Choline Chloride, an investigational phospholipid substrate replacement therapy for patients receiving parenteral support (PS). The company has no approved products and has not generated any revenues from product sales.
sellsTo: patients with non-muscle invasive bladder cancer

exposures.sentence: Protara’s portfolio includes two development programs utilizing TARA-002, an investigational cell therapy in development for the treatment of non-muscle invasive bladder cancer, or NMIBC, and lymphatic malformations, or LMs.

Additionally, the Company’s portfolio includes Intravenous, or IV, Choline Chloride, an investigational phospholipid substrate replacement therapy in development for patients receiving parenteral support, or PS.
